scripts.build: grunt clean copy && npm run bootstrap && npm run build-compat && grunt bundle uglify
scripts.build-compat: npm run build-compat-data && npm run build-compat-entries && npm run build-compat-modules-by-versions
scripts.lint: grunt clean copy && npm run bootstrap && npm run build-compat && eslint ./
scripts.unit-tests: grunt clean copy && npm run bootstrap && npm run build-compat && grunt bundle webpack:helpers webpack:tests karma:tests
scripts.unit-tests-pure: grunt clean copy && npm run build-compat && grunt webpack:helpers webpack:pure karma:pure
scripts.observables-tests: babel node_modules/es-observable/test/ -d tests/bundles/observables-tests/ && node tests/observables/adapter && node tests/observables/adapter-pure
scripts.test: grunt clean copy && npm run bootstrap && npm run build-compat && eslint ./ && grunt webpack:helpers webpack:tests bundle uglify karma:tests webpack:helpers webpack:pure karma:pure && npm run promises-tests && npm run observables-tests && npm run commonjs-tests && npm run commonjs-entries-content && npm run targets-parser-tests
